name: GetEthernetPacket
title: GetEthernetPacket
description: This function can only be called inside of an on PDU handler. The function will return in its second parameter the Ethernet packet, the PDU was contained.

parameters.name: this
parameters.description: Handle to the currently handled (received) PDU object.

parameters.name: packet
parameters.description: Reference to an Ethernet Packet object that will contain the overall received packet data and information.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
